headline: EAIC received 1,200 complaints but investigated only 89 in 2025
context: The Enforcement Agency Integrity Commission received 1,200 complaints against enforcement officers in 2025 but completed investigations into only 89 cases.

cards.big: 1,200 complaints filed against enforcement officers — only 89 investigated
cards.sub: EAIC completed just 7.4% of cases, leaving 93% of complainants without answers

cards.big: EAIC Act 2009 covers police, immigration, customs, and 19 other agencies
cards.sub: Mandate covers 150,000 enforcement officers but commission has only 67 investigators

cards.big: EAIC's RM12 million budget is 0.008% of enforcement agencies' combined budgets
cards.sub: Oversight body is funded at a fraction needed for meaningful accountability

cards.big: UK's IOPC completed 72% of police complaint investigations within 12 months
cards.sub: International benchmarks show much higher completion rates are achievable

cards.big: An oversight body that investigates 7% of complaints provides the illusion of accountability
Should EAIC be replaced with a fully empowered Independent Police Complaints Commission?
